name: tock-mcp
description: Tock (exploretock.com) restaurant discovery for Claude — list cities, search a metro, get venue details and their bookable experiences, prices, and open dates/times. Relays every request through the fetchproxy browser extension (github.com/chrischall/fetchproxy) running in your signed-in exploretock.com tab, so there's no cookie paste or bot-wall dance.

tools.name: tock_list_metros
tools.description: List Tock cities/metros (name, slug, business count), optionally filtered.

tools.name: tock_search_restaurants
tools.description: List / search restaurants in a Tock metro by slug, with an optional text query.

tools.name: tock_get_restaurant
tools.description: Get full details for a Tock venue by slug: cuisine, price, location, and its bookable experiences.

tools.name: tock_get_availability
tools.description: Get a venue's bookable calendar: experiences, prices, party sizes, and open dates/times.

tools.name: tock_list_reservations
tools.description: List the signed-in user's Tock reservations (upcoming / past / canceled) via the GraphQL API (requires a signed-in exploretock.com tab).

tools.name: tock_get_profile
tools.description: Get the signed-in user's Tock account identity — name, email (requires a signed-in exploretock.com tab).
